settings.type_help: The selected type must match the type of your reCAPTCHA credentials. Checkbox and Invisible are both reCAPTCHA v2; v3 is score-based and runs silently.
settings.v3_threshold_help: Submissions scoring below this value (0.0 = likely bot, 1.0 = likely human) will be rejected. Google suggests 0.5 as a starting point. Only used when the type is set to v3.

test.title: Test reCAPTCHA
test.help_text:
This test will use the current values entered above. Make sure to reload the test after modifying settings, and don't forget to save once the test passes!
Below may not reflect the saved settings.

permissions.post_without_captcha: Create posts and discussions without captcha

lib.error: There was an error submitting reCAPTCHA. Try again.
lib.not_completed: Please complete the reCAPTCHA check before continuing.
lib.rejected: The reCAPTCHA check failed. Please try again.
lib.unknown_error: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.

validation.recaptcha-unknown: An unknown error occurred while validating reCAPTCHA ({errors}).
